title: astragalus urmiensis
intro: Astragalus urmiensis, also known as Astragalus urmiensis Bunge, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Iran and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus urmiensis include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as potentially lowering blood sugar levels and reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease. Astragalus urmiensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
